basic_details.job_title: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Lecturers and Lab Technicians Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech/BS in Civil Engineering, B.E/B.Tech/BS in Computer Science and Engineering, Master’s Degree in Mathematics, Bachelor degree of Engineering, Diploma in respective field, Senior Secondary pass (10+2) with vocational course certificate
qualification.details: Lecturer(Civil): B.E/B.Tech/BS in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/ Institute with First Class or equivalent. Lecturer(CSE): B.E/B.Tech/BS in Computer Science and Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with First Class or equivalent. Lecturer(Maths): Master’s Degree in Mathematics from recognized University/Institute with first class or equivalent either at Bachelors or at Masters level. Lab. Technician(Civil): Bachelor degree of Engineering in the respective field from a recognized university OR Diploma in respective field from a recognized educational / Technical institution OR Senior Secondary pass (10+2) with vocational course certificate in an appropriate trade with 3 years practical experience. Lab. Technician(Computer): Bachelor degree of Engineering in the respective field from a recognized university OR Graduation in Science Stream (with Maths as a subject in Degree level) and PDCA from a recognized Educational/Technical Institution OR Senior Secondary pass (10+2) with vocational course certificate in an appropriate trade with 3 years practical experience.

salary_details.details: Lecturers and Lab Technicians: Rs.54,000/- - Rs.85,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman and Nicobar Administration Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.andamannicobar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Andaman and Nicobar Administration recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Andaman and Nicobar Administration recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Lecturers and Lab Technicians?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the posts of Lecturers and Lab Technicians in the Andaman and Nicobar Administration recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: For Lecturer posts, the educational qualifications vary by specialization. It includes B.E/B.Tech/BS in Civil Engineering, B.E/B.Tech/BS in Computer Science and Engineering, and Master’s Degree in Mathematics, with specific first-class requirements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the positions of Lecturers and Lab Technicians will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 54,000/- to Rs. 85,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Andaman and Nicobar Administration.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Andaman and Nicobar Administration, which is www.andamannicobar.gov.in.
